title: Pehkui Resizer
description: this mod adds tools to change the size of yourself and all Entitys! (shrink, grow, resize!)
body:
[![Bisecthosting banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/a0753235-ef41-4aeb-bf56-2253bd884c1b.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/lumin3ra)
About The mod 

- This mod uses the library mod pehkui, it needs to be installed in order for this mod to work
- Resizer item (Change your size and the size of any entity)
- Block to resize with redstone signal

this mod makes it really easy to resize yourself and other Entitys!

The Resizer can be crafted so you can use it in Survival!

The Resizer item and block have a default range of 0.01 to 10, which is configurable in a config file

[Join my Discord Server!](https://discord.com/invite/PCEaw8bbay)
